'''hazhasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamorado|enamorado]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamorado|enamorado]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazhasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhæsæth|hæzhæsæth]] || [[word:hæzhæsæj|hæzhæsæj]] || [[word:hæzhæsæsh|hæzhæsæsh]] || [[word:hæzhæsæ|hæzhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhazhasath|hazhazhasath]] || [[word:hazhazhasaj|hazhazhasaj]] || [[word:hazhazhasash|hazhazhasash]] || [[word:hazhazhasa|hazhazhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhasath|hazhasath]] || [[word:hazhasaj|hazhasaj]] || [[word:hazhasash|hazhasash]] || [[word:hazhasa|hazhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhafsath|hazhafsath]] || [[word:hazhafsaj|hazhafsaj]] || [[word:hazhafsash|hazhafsash]] || [[word:hazhafsaf|hazhafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhasatha|hazhasatha]] || [[word:hazhasaja|hazhasaja]] || [[word:hazhasasha|hazhasasha]] || [[word:hazhasaka|hazhasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhasath|hazhasath]] || [[word:hazhasaj|hazhasaj]] || [[word:hazhasash|hazhasash]] || [[word:hazhasa|hazhasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhasathal|hazhasathal]] || [[word:hazhasajal|hazhasajal]] || [[word:hazhasashal|hazhasashal]] || [[word:hazhasakal|hazhasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhasathatha|hazhasathatha]] || [[word:hazhasajaja|hazhasajaja]] || [[word:hazhasashasha|hazhasashasha]] || [[word:hazhasaka|hazhasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhasathan|hazhasathan]] || [[word:hazhasajan|hazhasajan]] || [[word:hazhasashan|hazhasashan]] || [[word:hazhasakan|hazhasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhasathaoro|hazhasathaoro]] || [[word:hazhasajaoro|hazhasajaoro]] || [[word:hazhasashaoro|hazhasashaoro]] || [[word:hazhasakaoro|hazhasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
